overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic city during golden hour. The character moves from a busy street with traffic to an open palm-lined walkway with views of the high-tech city skyline across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to multi-lane street with commercial buildings

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the left side of the street
white sedan and other vehicles pass by on the busy street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to traffic, maintaining a consistent pace through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan coat walking ahead on the sidewalk at a similar pace
purple sports car driving past on the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated advertisements
low dark concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the waterfront drop
cluster of towering skyscrapers with construction cranes visible across the water
tall palm trees lining the edge of the waterfront promenade in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a busy urban sidewalk during golden hour, with modern glass commercial buildings rising on the left and a traffic barrier separating the path from the waterfront on the right. Vehicles including a distinctive purple sports car drive past on the multi-lane street, while the futuristic city skyline looms ahead across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with panoramic city views

events.description: exiting the enclosed commercial street into the open waterfront promenade
character glances toward the water and distant skyline while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront path, occasionally looking out at the water and the distant skyline

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the promenade gradually moving out of view

entered.detail: calm expanse of water with a large ship or ferry visible in the distance
silhouette of an amusement park roller coaster against the skyline
distinctive modern architectural structure with curved orange beams visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide waterfront promenade bathed in golden hour light, with palm trees now prominent along the right side. The character moves away from the busy street into a more open area with clear views of the water, distant ships, and the futuristic skyline now visible to the left across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with decorative arched canopy structure

events.description: approaching the orange arched canopy structure that marks the plaza entrance
briefly passing behind a structural support column or sign

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade approaching the distinctive arched plaza structure, maintaining a steady walking pace

entered.detail: tall ornate black street lamp with multiple lantern fixtures
modern benches and low walls arranged under the canopy structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a modern plaza featuring a distinctive orange arched canopy structure on the left. The waterfront barrier continues along the right with the city skyline now centered in the background. The path transitions to tiled pavement as the character nears the architectural canopy, with decorative street lamps and scattered trees marking this public space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban sidewalk into an expansive, architectural waterfront plaza during the golden hour. It begins beside towering glass commercial buildings and a multi-lane street where a purple sports car drives past, with the camera trailing the character along a traffic barrier. As the character moves forward, the environment opens up into a wide promenade where the busy street recedes and palm trees emerge along the right, revealing clear views of distant ships and the futuristic skyline across the bay. The scene then shifts toward a modern public space as the path transitions to tiled pavement, moving past decorative street lamps and scattered trees. Finally, the camera approaches a distinctive orange arched canopy structure on the left while the high-tech city skyline remains centered in the background.
